hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into a unified onboarding workflow that helps compliance teams manage identity verification, risk review, and audit evidence in one place.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding slows when identity checks disconnect
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with slow, manual identity verification across multiple disconnected KYC and KYB providers. This fragmentation creates gaps in risk review, weak audit trails, and inconsistent decision records that complicate regulatory readiness and operational efficiency.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity and company verification outputs into unified, risk-based onboarding workflows that preserve audit trails and provide compliance teams with a clear view of decisions and supporting evidence.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects identity and corporate verification results through risk-based routing, case review, decision logging and evidence preservation for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY unifies KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured identity verification workflows, preserving evidence and decisions for clearer compliance control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams by unifying provider orchestration, preserving audit-ready evidence, and enabling secure enterprise deployment for thorough identity verification workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support identity verification for onboarding
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how provider checks feed into onboarding workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence and audit trails preserve verification data
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe risk-based routing and provider orchestration in SFTY
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYB and screening outputs into one structured compliance workflow for identity verification, risk review and decision tracking.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates identity and corporate checks, sanctions screening and review routing into a connected onboarding workflow with risk-based paths and case creation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready records of all onboarding decisions, provider results, review notes and evidence packages for compliance and regulatory readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with your existing KYC and KYB providers, consolidating their outputs without disrupting current vendor relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance layer above providers, structuring their outputs into workflows without replacing underlying identity verification services.
final_title: Structure identity verification into one onboarding workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into controlled identity verification, risk review, cases and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
